_comment: Agent SOP update config. Default location: ~/.claude/agent-sop.config.json. Per-project override: .claude/agent-sop.config.json (takes precedence if present). Auto-created by setup.sh at install; /update-agent-sop writes here each sync.
_local_path_note: Path to a local agent-sop checkout. Used first. If missing or invalid, /update-agent-sop falls back to GitHub raw.
_github_note: GitHub repo (OWNER/REPO). Used when local_path is unavailable. Fetches from raw.githubusercontent.com/{github}/main/{file}.
_update_reminder_values: weekly | manual | off. /restart-sop prints a one-line staleness warning when last_update_check is older than this cadence.
_last_update_check_note: ISO date string or null. Updated by /update-agent-sop on each run.

baseline_shas._comment: SHA-256 of each pristine-replica file at last sync. Used for three-way diff (baseline vs local vs upstream) to detect local modifications. Populated by setup.sh at install and updated by /update-agent-sop per file.
